title: Empty Rule Stub
description: Demonstrate the empty rule pattern for grammar prototyping and incremental development.

motivation.why: Empty rules allow prototyping grammars incrementally by stubbing out incomplete parts. This enables testing partial grammars before all rules are implemented.

inputFormat.description: Any input that matches the partial grammar.

examples.description: Input to match against stubbed grammar

outputFormat.description: Partial parse results from incomplete grammar.
